title: Really annoying villagers
description: Ever wanted villagers to be 10x more annoying?
body:
# **probably the worst resource pack ever**

replaces all villager sounds with white female voicelines from postal 2

get ready to be called a motherfucker over and over and over again

## _**disclaimer**_

I am not responsible for violent bursts of rage. Nor am I responsible for any villager deaths due to said rage
